subcodes.first_line: O thou who art drawn by the fragrances of God! Blessed art thou for that by reason of which thou hast been kindled by the fire of the love of God
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
